headline: Megacap earnings binary meets oil risk: tonight's Alphabet and Tesla prints — not the intraday tape — own Thursday's open
NDX bouncing in negative gamma below the 29,595 flip — GOOGL + TSLA Wednesday night is the week’s volatility gate; gap risk stays Extreme.
Day-9 Iran airstrikes + Houthi Saudi embargo collide with peak Mag-7 earnings week — NDX in negative gamma, SPX one tick above its flip.
Chip rout splits the tape — NDX in negative gamma with Netflix binary tonight; SPX cushioned above 7,502 flip; RUT/DJX rotation intact.
Inflation relief + ASML AI beat drive equities higher, but negative NDX gamma and live Iran/Hormuz strikes keep overnight tail risk elevated into Thursday’s NFLX print.
